item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses the requested next SMS parking reminder as the default, identifies the repeated pattern of downstream material/info overlays after现场 failures, and moves the action upstream to a unified guest-arrival responsibility and handoff mechanism covering入口、签到、动线、停车. It does not provide any parking-reminder copy or implementation step for the requested local patch."}
